title: Even Stronger Steel Production Both In and Outside of China
section_path: Even Stronger Steel Production Both In and Outside of China
section_path_text: Even Stronger Steel Production Both In and Outside of China
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed last week, iron ore consumption has been faring very well both in and outside of China as global steel production has remained robust. Notable is that while April's global steel production data was very encouraging, new is that May's data has been released and shows steel production has climbed even further. Global crude steel production totaled a record 174.4 million tons last month.
